hints: A dark or unnamed room. Most exits loop back to the same place!
FEE (feel around) to find a coin on the floor. E is the only unique exit.
DO NOT break the mirror - it causes a cave-in (death)!
FEE finds a gold coin treasure. E leads to the dressing room with the gold scarab. All other exits go to room 9. BRE MIR = death.

effects: Message: 1000 years bad luck starts with a cave in!
Message: I feel a coin on the floor

notes: Mystery room with mirror. FEE finds gold coin treasure. BRE MIR is fatal (cave-in). E=dressing room (26). All other exits loop to passageway (9).
